GpuProjectExec: expr=[sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)@0 as store_only, sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)@1 as catalog_only, sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)@2 as store_and_catalog]
  GpuGlobalLimitExec: skip=0, fetch=100
    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)]
      GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN ssci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL AND csci.customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)]
          GpuProjectExec: expr=[customer_sk@1 IS NOT NULL as __common_expr_1, customer_sk@1 as customer_sk, customer_sk@0 as customer_sk]
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
              GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Full, on=[(customer_sk@0, customer_sk@0), (item_sk@1, item_sk@1)], projection=[0, 2]
                GpuProjectExec: expr=[cs_bill_customer_sk@0 as customer_sk, cs_item_sk@1 as item_sk]
                  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[cs_bill_customer_sk, cs_item_sk], aggr=[]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cs_bill_customer_sk@0, cs_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[cs_bill_customer_sk, cs_item_sk], aggr=[]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, cs_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                                    GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_month_seq@1 >= 1200 AND d_month_seq@1 <= 1211, projection=[0]

                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=33554432
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cs_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=33554432
                GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_customer_sk@0 as customer_sk, ss_item_sk@1 as item_sk]
                  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_customer_sk, ss_item_sk], aggr=[]

                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_customer_sk@0, ss_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_customer_sk, ss_item_sk], aggr=[]

--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
  GpuGlobalLimitExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
    GpuAggregateExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
      GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64

          GpuProjectExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
              GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24

                  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
